## Functional Requirements

- Shared grocery list tied to meals
- Manual add/remove items
- Amazon Alexa voice commands:
  - Add grocery item
  - Add or edit meal

## Acceptance Criteria

- Voice commands update lists correctly
- Grocery list can be reused and cleared
- Fallback works if Alexa is unavailable

## Jenya Impact

Allows hands-free planning during chaotic moments (kids, cooking, multitasking).
